environment_setup.filesystem_state: Pricing tool accepts absolute values unless a percentage flag is explicitly passed.

evaluation_loop.condition: Apply a 20% discount to all items in the 'Summer Sale' category.

injected_failure_state.observation:
Success: Reduced prices by $20.00 for 140 items in 'Summer Sale'.
[System Warning: Applied a flat $20 discount instead of a 20% discount.]

evaluation_loop.success_criteria: Agent reverses the flat $20 deduction and re-runs the script using the correct percentage flag (e.g., --percent 20).
